title: GooLag Modpack
description: This is just a GooLag modpack in a GooLag world.
body:
# GooLag Modpack

This pack has great optimization and quality-of-life features. It doesn't go too overboard on extra content and technology. Consider it a Vanillla+...+!

## Features
- Client and server optimizations like [ServerCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/servercore) and much more
- Quality of life improvements
- [Xaero's World Map](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-world-map) and [Xaero's Minimap](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-minimap)
- Exciting terrain and biomes from [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith) and [Terrestria](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrestria)
- Better villages and structures
- Extra dimensions like [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra) and [The Bumblezone](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-bumblezone-fabric)
- And more fun additions!

## Future Plans

- add Twilight Forest
- add extra mobs
